name: Blender Gazpacho
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Cold vegetable stock or water
1 tbsp Bragg's Liquid Aminos (unfermented soy product, a salt replacer, is available in health food stores)
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice or quarter vegetables, setting aside half a cucumber or zucchini for garnish.
2. Put the blended vegetables into a blender and blend for 3 seconds or until the cucumber is shredded.
3. Mix all ingredients in a bowl and refrigerate until serving time.
4. Finely chop half a cucumber or zucchini for garnish.
5. Makes 6 servings as a side dish or 4 servings as a main dish.
